# Next.js Professional Starter

> Production-ready Next.js starter for agencies, freelancers and companies.

## Stack

- Next.js 16 with App Router
- React 19
- TypeScript 5
- Tailwind CSS 4
- React Hook Form + Zod

## Structure

- /src/app — App Router pages and layouts
- /src/components/ui — Reusable UI components (Button, Card, Input, Textarea)
- /src/components/layout — Header, Footer
- /src/components/forms — ContactForm
- /src/config — Site config and navigation
- /src/lib — Utilities (cn, validations)
- /src/types — TypeScript types

## Features

- SEO: metadata, sitemap, robots.txt, Open Graph, JSON-LD
- Forms: validation with Zod, React Hook Form
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions with lint, typecheck and build
- Deployment: Vercel

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/alvarorubio-dev/nextjs-professional-starter
- Live: https://nextjs-professional-starter.vercel.app
